news.t: GraniteShares Announces Weekly Distributions for its YieldBOOST ETFs
GraniteShares Announces Weekly Distributions for its YieldBOOST ETFs.

GraniteShares Announces Weekly Distributions for its YieldBOOST ETFs: COYY, TSYY, NVYY, XBTY, AMYY, TQQY, AZYY, YSPY, MTYY, PLYY, HOYY, SMYY, BBYY, FBYY, IOYY, MAAY, NUGY, SEMY, QBY, RGYY, HMYY, RTYY, MUYY, TMYY, CWY, CRY and 20+ Others

holdings.infoBox: COYY is an equity ETF with a total of 10 individual holdings. The top holdings are United States Treasury Bills 3.545% stock at 63.99%, United States Treasury Bills 0% at 29.58%, Us Dollars at 6.91%, Put Conl June 5.27 06/10/2026 at 0.42%, and Put Conl June 4.69 06/18/2026 at 0.06%.

overview.description: The GraniteShares YieldBOOST COIN ETF (COYY) is an exchange-traded fund that mostly invests in financials equity. The fund is actively managed seeking current income and the daily 2x leverage of the price performance of Coinbase Global, Inc. (ticker: COIN) COYY was launched on Jul 28, 2025 and is issued by GraniteShares.
